item.name: Web of Science Expanded Search Documents via GET

request.name: Web of Science Expanded Search Documents via GET

description.content: Submit search queries to retrieve Web of Science document metadata. Supports the Web of Science Advanced Search Query syntax with field tags, boolean operators, and wildcard characters. Returns a query ID and initial results page for subsequent pagination.

query.description: (Required) Database to search (e.g., WOS for Web of Science Core Collection).
(Required) Advanced search query string using Web of Science query syntax. Field tags include TS (topic), AU (author), TI (title), SO (source), DO (DOI), OG (organization), etc.
Comma-separated list of WOS database editions to search.
Publication date range filter in format begin=YYYY-MM-DD&end=YYYY-MM-DD.
Field and direction for sorting results.

response.name: Successful response with search results and query ID

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

item.name: Web of Science Expanded Search Documents via POST

request.name: Web of Science Expanded Search Documents via POST

description.content: Submit search queries via POST to retrieve Web of Science document metadata. Equivalent to the GET search endpoint but allows larger query parameters in the request body.

response.name: Successful response with search results

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

item.name: Web of Science Expanded Fetch Query Results

request.name: Web of Science Expanded Fetch Query Results

description.content: Retrieve records from a previously submitted search query using the query ID returned from the search endpoint. Supports pagination through large result sets with configurable record counts and sorting.

query.description: Field and direction for sorting results.
Comma-separated list of fields to include in response.

variable.description: (Required) Query identifier returned from the search endpoint.

response.name: Successful response with query results

variable.description: (Required) Query identifier returned from the search endpoint.

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

variable.description: (Required) Query identifier returned from the search endpoint.

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

item.name: Web of Science Expanded Get Record IDs for Query

request.name: Web of Science Expanded Get Record IDs for Query

description.content: Retrieve only the unique identifiers for records matching a previously submitted search query. More efficient than retrieving full records when only UIDs are needed for deduplication or subsequent lookups.

query.description: Number of record IDs to return.

variable.description: (Required) Query identifier returned from the search endpoint.

response.name: Successful response with array of unique identifiers

variable.description: (Required) Query identifier returned from the search endpoint.

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

variable.description: (Required) Query identifier returned from the search endpoint.

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

item.name: Web of Science Expanded Get Records by Unique ID

request.name: Web of Science Expanded Get Records by Unique ID

description.content: Retrieve one or more Web of Science records directly by their unique identifiers. Supports comma-separated lists of UIDs for batch retrieval. Returns full item-level metadata including addresses and affiliations.

variable.description: (Required) Single WOS unique identifier or comma-separated list of UIDs (e.g., WOS:000349044100001,WOS:000349044100002).

response.name: Successful response with record details

variable.description: (Required) Single WOS unique identifier or comma-separated list of UIDs (e.g., WOS:000349044100001,WOS:000349044100002).

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

variable.description: (Required) Single WOS unique identifier or comma-separated list of UIDs (e.g., WOS:000349044100001,WOS:000349044100002).

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

item.name: Web of Science Expanded Get Citing Articles

request.name: Web of Science Expanded Get Citing Articles

description.content: Find articles that cite a specific Web of Science document identified by its unique identifier. Returns citation metadata and times-cited counts from the Web of Science Core Collection.

query.description: (Required) WOS unique identifier of the article to find citing articles for.

response.name: Successful response with citing articles

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

item.name: Web of Science Expanded Get References for Article

request.name: Web of Science Expanded Get References for Article

description.content: Retrieve the reference list cited by a specific Web of Science document. Returns all cited works including those outside the Web of Science Core Collection.

query.description: (Required) WOS unique identifier of the article to get references for.

response.name: Successful response with reference list

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

item.name: Web of Science Expanded Get Related Records

request.name: Web of Science Expanded Get Related Records

description.content: Discover records that share cited references with a specified Web of Science article. Returns the parent record plus related documents ranked by the number of shared references.

query.description: (Required) WOS unique identifier of the article to find related records for.
Number of related records to return.

response.name: Successful response with related records

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

item.name: Web of Science Expanded Get Citation Report for Query

request.name: Web of Science Expanded Get Citation Report for Query

description.content: Generate a citation report for a query result set, providing aggregate citation statistics including total citations, average citations per item, h-index, and year-by-year citation counts.

variable.description: (Required) Query identifier for the result set to report on.
(Required) Query identifier for the result set to report on.

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

response.name: Bad request or result set too large

variable.description: (Required) Query identifier for the result set to report on.

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

item.name: Web of Science Expanded Get Category Context for Record

request.name: Web of Science Expanded Get Category Context for Record

description.content: Retrieve the categorization context for citing and cited references of a Web of Science article. Returns ASCA traditional category distribution for the specified scope.

query.description: Scope of category context (Citing, Referenced, or Aggregated).

variable.description: (Required) WOS unique identifier of the article.
(Required) WOS unique identifier of the article.

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

variable.description: (Required) WOS unique identifier of the article.

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

The Web of Science API Expanded provides rich searching across the Web of Science based on your subscription to retrieve item-level metadata, including times-cited counts and contributor addresses and affiliations. It supports advanced search, citation analysis, related records discovery, reference retrieval, and bibliometric reporting with both JSON and XML output formats.
